mods.name: Performance Intake
mods.description: A high-flow intake for the EJ257 provides improved turbo induction sound and slightly better airflow to the top-mount intercooler.
mods.installNotes: Remove stock airbox. Install new intake tube and filter. COBB intake requires matched AccessPort map. 20 minute install.

mods.name: Catback Exhaust
mods.description: The VA STI sounds great stock, but an aftermarket catback adds volume and deeper tones while reducing backpressure.
mods.partNumbers: Invidia R400 HS15STIGM4SS, Tomei Expreme Ti Type-80
mods.installNotes: Bolt-on from the mid-pipe flange. Quad tip design matches factory bumper diffuser. No cutting required. 45 minutes on jack stands.

mods.name: Catted Downpipe
mods.description: A high-flow catted downpipe reduces exhaust restriction while maintaining emissions compliance. Essential for Stage 2 tuning.
mods.partNumbers: COBB GESi Catted Downpipe 512102, Invidia Catted DP
mods.installNotes: Access from below on a lift. The turbo-to-downpipe connection is tight. Pre-soak bolts. Must retune with COBB Stage 2 map or custom protune after install. 2 hours.

mods.name: Cobb AccessPort Tune
mods.description: The AccessPort V3 provides OTS maps and custom tuning support. Stage 1 is safe on stock hardware; Stage 2 with downpipe is the sweet spot.
mods.partNumbers: COBB AccessPort V3 AP3-SUB-005, COBB Stage 2 map pack
mods.installNotes: Flash via OBD-II. Start with Stage 1 on 93 octane. Monitor DAM (Dynamic Advance Multiplier) and Fine Knock Learn values. Custom protune from a reputable EJ tuner strongly recommended for long-term reliability.

mods.name: Top-Mount Intercooler Upgrade
mods.description: Replace the stock TMIC with a larger core for drastically reduced charge temps. The factory unit heat soaks after 2–3 hard pulls.
mods.partNumbers: GrimmSpeed TMIC 090070, Process West Verticooler VA
mods.installNotes: Unbolt stock TMIC and Y-pipe. New unit drops into factory location. Recalibrate boost targets in tune after install. 1–2 hours. Significant improvement in back-to-back pull consistency.

mods.name: Flex Fuel Kit
mods.description: A flex fuel kit allows running E85 ethanol fuel for significantly more power and knock resistance. The EJ257 loves E85.
mods.partNumbers: COBB Flex Fuel Kit 343001, Delicious Tuning Flex Fuel Kit
mods.installNotes: Install ethanol content sensor inline with the fuel feed line. Wire sensor to AccessPort or standalone ECU. Requires E85-specific tune. E85 adds 30–50hp over 93 octane at the same boost. Fuel economy drops 30%.

mods.name: Built EJ257 Short Block
mods.description: Forged internals address the EJ257's Achilles heel — ringland failure. A built short block supports 500+ hp reliably.
mods.partNumbers: IAG Stage 2.5 Closed Deck Block, Manley H-Tuff rods
mods.installNotes: Full engine-out rebuild. Closed deck block is ideal for high boost. Forged pistons, rods, bearings, and ARP head studs. New gaskets and seals throughout. Custom tune mandatory. 40+ hours.

mods.name: Coilover Suspension
mods.description: Adjustable coilovers unlock the VA STI's chassis potential with precise ride height and damping adjustments for street or track.
mods.partNumbers: KW V3 35245005, Fortune Auto 500 Series VA
mods.installNotes: Full strut replacement at all corners. Electronic damper cars (if equipped) need damper delete wiring. Set initial drop to 20mm. Full alignment required.
